text: Sam - $4M at 20 pre, confirmed. One board seat for you, one independent (vacant, fills only with my sign-off). Docs out this week, close end of month. Anything feel off? Happy to talk it through.
before standup - the auth bug is in the token refresh path, not login. I think we patch the refresh handler today, right? lmk
Hi Dana! No rush on my account. When you're back to it, the one thing worth a look is slide 4 - it's the number your team flagged on the call. We re-ran it on your data; it held.
